title: Fix: Null pointer exception
original_text: Fixed null pointer exception in user profile loading. Added null checks for optional user fields. Implemented defensive programming patterns. Added error handling for missing data. Updated unit tests for null cases. Result: null pointer exception fixed.
expected_subject: fix(core): fix null pointer exception in user profile
expected_body_lines: - Add null checks for optional user fields
- Add error handling for missing data
- Update unit tests for null cases
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(core): fix null pointer exception in user profile"
